function.name: get_weather
function.title: Weather Forecast Function
function.description: Retrieves current weather conditions and forecast data for a given location. This function supports city names, ZIP codes, and geographic coordinates. It returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, precipitation probability, and a multi-day forecast summary with detailed daily breakdowns including high/low temperatures and conditions.

location.title: Location Name
location.description: The city name, ZIP code, or geographic coordinates for which to retrieve weather data. Examples include 'San Francisco, CA', '94105', or '37.7749,-122.4194'.

units.title: Temperature Units
units.description: The temperature unit system to use for the returned weather data. Celsius is the default for most international locations, while Fahrenheit is common in the United States.

forecast_days.title: Forecast Days
forecast_days.description: Number of days to include in the forecast, ranging from 1 to 14 days ahead. Defaults to 1 when not specified.

include_hourly.title: Include Hourly Breakdown
include_hourly.description: Whether to include hour-by-hour weather data in the response for each forecast day. Enabling this flag significantly increases response size.
